name: WisdomAI
what: NL analytics that reasons across structured, unstructured and 'dirty' data via an 'enterprise context layer'; autonomous agents surface opportunities/risks/trends; LLM only writes the query to curb hallucination.
why_tier: Canonical Tanderrum-class: warehouse/data-analyst vocabulary carrying Astell's promise, but explicitly claims unstructured data + a context layer. One connector-pivot from direct; pick higher.
notes: $73M total (Coatue $23M seed + Kleiner Perkins / NVentures $50M Series A, Nov 2025); CEO Soham Mazumdar (ex-Rubrik); ~40 enterprise customers (Cisco, ConocoPhillips, Patreon). HQ not confirmed (Bay Area).

name: Knowi
what: Agentic BI: 20+ specialized agents run the full analytics workflow from one NL prompt across 70+ data sources, no semantic layer/data modeling required; SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA-ready, proprietary in-house AI.
why_tier: AI analyst bounded to databases/warehouses = Tier 2 data-intel per the Zenlytic calibration; agent-orchestrated but still structured-data-perimeter.
notes: Funding/founding not disclosed on site; positions against ThoughtSpot/Looker. Likely an older BI vendor that went AI-native — net-new to registry.

name: Knowlee
what: Enterprise AI 'OS' that deploys custom AI agents to run recurring work across sales, recruiting, marketing, legal, finance and ops in parallel, connecting to existing CRM/tools with a full audit trail.
why_tier: Horizontal cross-tool agent platform (Dust/Coworker family by mechanic) in EU/agent-execution vocabulary; one positioning pivot from a direct rival. Pick higher when torn.
notes: Led by Matteo Mirabelli; VAT-registered in Italy; EU/GDPR/AI-Act compliance framing. No funding disclosed. Execution-automation emphasis (vs. a unified knowledge/context graph) — watch trajectory.
